replacementWorkstreams.title: Deepen validation coverage
replacementWorkstreams.description: Add more externally anchored benchmark datasets and stronger time-series validation packs.

replacementWorkstreams.title: Improve dermal kinetics
replacementWorkstreams.description: Extend dermal execution beyond bounded physchem and barrier-material modifiers.

replacementWorkstreams.title: Keep worker high-tier boundaries explicit
replacementWorkstreams.description: Treat worker high-tier support as bounded execution plus governed external exchange unless a native solver integration is intentionally introduced.

replacementWorkstreams.title: Preserve MCP boundaries
replacementWorkstreams.description: Keep Exposure MCP separate from Fate MCP, Dietary MCP, and PBPK MCP while standardizing handoff contracts.

replacementWorkstreams.title: Improve architectural legibility
replacementWorkstreams.description: Explain the released surface as core engine plus bounded worker, exchange, and validation layers.

notes: The original TaskMaster plan is intentionally retired because it still marked already released implementation phases as pending.
Recover the historical pre-release backlog from git history if exact pre-release planning detail is required.
